title: Hypurr Hour
summary_title: EVM stability, testnet chaos, and Hyperliquid's black box strategy
summary_description: Developers debate when Hyperliquid's EVM launches while Liquid Launch pitches its fair launch platform.

key_moments.label: Liquid Launch intro: fair launch platform on Hyperliquid EVM testnet
Shishu explains Liquid Launch's competing launchpad model vs H-Fund
Team pivoted from Sei, saw opportunity on Hyperliquid despite ecosystem maturity
Debate: EVM launch timeline—end of January vs Q1/Q2 2025
Shishu: testnet stability is the true EVM readiness metric, currently unstable
Aaron (Felix Protocol) defends Hyperliquid's secretive dev approach as competitive advantage
Bullish case: Hyperliquid as Ethereum 2.0 with native gas token, real staying power
